headline: Machine Learning Engineer — LLM Systems & MLOps
summary: ML engineer with 4 years of experience taking LLM and computer-vision systems from prototype to production. Designed RAG platforms serving 40k daily queries, cut inference costs by 35%, and led the MLOps practice for a 12-person data team. Looking to build AI products that survive contact with real users.

experience.title: Machine Learning Engineer
bullets: Architected the retrieval-augmented generation platform behind the flagship assistant: hybrid BM25 + dense retrieval, reranking, and grounded citation checks serving 40k queries/day at p95 < 900 ms.
Cut LLM serving costs 35% by routing between fine-tuned small models and frontier APIs based on query complexity scoring.
Built the evaluation harness (LLM-as-judge + golden sets) that gates every prompt and model change in CI.

experience.title: Data Scientist
bullets: Shipped demand-forecasting models (gradient boosting, hierarchical reconciliation) covering 1,200 stores, reducing stockouts 18%.
Industrialized the feature pipeline on Spark + Airflow; training-to-deploy time fell from 3 weeks to 2 days.
Mentored two junior data scientists and ran the team's paper-reading group.

experience.title: Research Intern — Computer Vision
bullets: Implemented self-supervised pretraining (SimCLR variants) for defect detection on industrial imagery; +9 mAP over the supervised baseline with 10x less labeled data.

details: Thesis: contrastive pretraining for industrial vision

projects.name: OpenRecruit
projects.description: Open-source CV tailoring tool: structured generation with schema-enforced LLM output and millisecond document rendering.

projects.name: GPU cost dashboard
projects.description: Real-time per-team GPU utilization and cost attribution adopted by 3 squads.
